deals.name: General Magic
deals.pitch: AI agents for insurance via SMS/iMessage/RCS
deals.notes: Led by Radical Ventures, a16z speedrun. Quote times from 30min to <3min.

deals.name: Baba Technologies
deals.pitch: Smart glasses for people with dysarthria/motor impairments
deals.notes: Founded by ALS caregivers. Early stage, building first prototype. hello@babatech.io

deals.name: Schematik
deals.pitch: Describe electronics in plain English, get code + wiring diagrams
deals.notes: Supports Arduino/ESP32/RPi. Beta. Based in Europe. @samuelbeek

deals.name: Sky Valley
deals.pitch: Adaptive software exoskeleton — make any software adaptive
deals.notes: Originally positioned around capturing developer intent, now refocusing on differentiation. Looking to hire design engineers and invest in brand. Product: getdiffer.com | Deck: https://deck.skyvalley.ac/deck/bggt_lgDLI-d | Data room: https://deck.skyvalley.ac/r/bggt_lgDLI-d | Product doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/14tfS7PENfOq3V5izCt7lTEzT-_CmEkQ30RWhrVqm0OU/edit | iris@skyvalley.ac, noam@skyvalley.ac

deals.name: Inflight
deals.pitch: AI-native feedback for product teams — quality feedback in hours, not days
deals.contact: Kyle Barber, Veer Gadodia, Michael Riddering
deals.notes: South Park Commons. Founders: Kyle Barber (ex-Airchat/Facebook/Tinder design), Veer Gadodia (MIT CS, ex-Airchat, AI/distributed systems), Michael Riddering (creator of Dive & Figma Academy, founding designer at Maven). Backed by Kindred Ventures. inflight.co

deals.name: Courtroom
deals.pitch: AI-powered jury + judge simulation for litigation teams
deals.notes: Two products: Juries AI (simulate jurors for case strategy) and Judges AI (battle-test briefs against simulated sitting judges). Claims 82.1% accuracy. Serves AmLaw 10/50/100/200 firms. Founded by Big Law alumni. courtroom.ai

deals.name: CompFly AI
deals.pitch: Solving the speed vs. safety paradox for the Agentic Era
deals.notes: Founded by Venkat Siva (Co-Founder & CEO). Prev VP Vehicle Cloud, Big Data & AI at Rivian (~5 yrs), Head of Platform Engineering at Walmart Labs. Wharton. SF-based. linkedin.com/in/venkiz

deals.name: Better Engines
deals.pitch: Narrative Intelligence — AI tools for filmmakers, dreamers, and creators
deals.notes: ⚡ NEED INTRO. Founded by Matthew Sims. Prev Principal AI Engineer at Spotter, Co-Founder Next Scene AI, Founding ML Engineer at Sudowrite, Visiting Research Scientist at Netflix. UC Berkeley. SF-based. linkedin.com/in/matthew-sims

people.name: Minqi Jiang
people.notes: Open-ended AI + RL researcher. Previously UCL CS + Meta FAIR, now Google DeepMind. Published Generative Data Refinement, JaxMARL, Rainbow Teaming. Based in Oxford. minch.co | @MinqiJiang

people.name: Aniketh Arvind
people.notes: Building Wyre — first social platform optimized for IRL. ECE + CS @ Princeton. Prev Emergence AI (agentic AI/ML intern), Gradient @ Princeton (Builder-in-Residence). Sigma Xi. wyre.social | linkedin.com/in/aniketh-arvind

people.name: Sara Hooker
people.notes: Building efficient AI that continually learns (betting against scaling). Prev VP of Research at Cohere (led Cohere Labs), Research Scientist at Google DeepMind. PhD CS at Mila (Hugo Larochelle, Aaron Courville). Kaggle ML Advisory Board, WEF AI council. Time Magazine most influential in AI. sarahooker.me

people.name: Adam Bhaloo
people.notes: Building for the US government at the National Design Studio. Interests: product design, fullstack dev, molecular gastronomy. adambhaloo.com

people.name: Zachary Baker
people.notes: Co-Founder @ Terac — specialized experts on-demand to power frontier research. Angel investor (a37, Nexa Labs, Clado, Shofo). Z Fellows. Prev ML Engineer at Radical Health, ML Researcher at MIT. UCL. SF-based. linkedin.com/in/zacharyrbaker

people.name: Adrian Martinez
people.notes: 17 y/o. Founder & CEO @ Infinilearn — fantasy math game for 6-8th graders, used across 4 schools. SWE at Snap (building agentic AI systems). West Coast Lead at LocalHost. Built HDR VR headset with 1517 grant. Mission Viejo, CA. linkedin.com/in/theadrianm

people.name: Jim Woodroffe
people.notes: In stealth — building AI for personal relationships and interactions, co-founding with Samuel Gill. Prev Director of Engineering at Datadog. Visiting Expert at Antler, Mentor at ERA. Engineering leader across Series A–C scale. Oberlin College. SF-based. linkedin.com/in/jimwoodroffe
